name: Spaghettini Alla Carrettiera
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground red chile, diced fresh tomatoes, minced garlic, and olive oil in a large saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until the garlic is fragrant, about 5 minutes.
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Use a food mill to remove seeds and skins from the tomato mixture.
5. Stir in the heavy cream and vodka. Simmer gently for an additional 10-15 minutes until the sauce has reduced slightly.
6. Meanwhile, bring 4 quarts of salted water to a boil. Add the spaghettini and cook until tender but still firm (al dente), about 2-3 minutes.
7. Drain the pasta well.
8. Mix the prepared sauce with the cooked spaghettini.
9. Sprinkle with coarsely chopped parsley before serving.
